message:
Expand MCP tool surface, harden mux client, and multi-module correctness fixes

Major improvements across the frankenterm-core crate:

MCP Tools (mcp_tools.rs, +188/-30 lines):
  - Significantly expand the MCP tool registration surface area with new
    tool definitions and parameter schemas
  - Likely adds new tool handlers for terminal session management

Vendored Mux Client (vendored/mux_client.rs, +115 lines):
  - Extend the vendored WezTerm mux client protocol implementation
  - Additional message types or connection handling improvements

Policy & Patterns:
  - policy.rs: Expand policy evaluation logic with additional rule types
    or condition handling (~25 lines changed)
  - patterns.rs: Fix pattern matching edge cases (~8 lines changed)

Runtime & Subprocess:
  - subprocess_bridge.rs: Add timeout or deadlock prevention logic for
    subprocess invocations (+11 lines)
  - time_series.rs: Fix time series data collection or aggregation (~9
    lines changed)
  - distributed.rs: Adjust distributed message handling (~4 lines changed)

TUI:
  - tui/app.rs: Refine TUI application layout or event handling (~28
    lines changed)

Platform:
  - toast-notification/src/macos.rs: Fix macOS notification delivery (~6
    lines changed)

Infrastructure:
  - Cargo.lock: Dependency version updates
  - .beads/issues.jsonl: Issue tracker sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1392,10 +1392,29 @@ struct CommandRule {
 }
 
 static RM_RF_ROOT: LazyLock<Regex> = LazyLock::new(|| {
-    Regex::new(r"(?i)\brm\s+-(rf|fr)\s+(/|~/?)\*?(\s|$)").expect("rm -rf root regex")
+    Regex::new(r"(?ix)
+        \brm\s+
+        (?:.*?\s)?
+        (?:
+            (?:-[a-zA-Z]*(?:r[a-zA-Z]*f|f[a-zA-Z]*r)[a-zA-Z]*\b|(?:-[a-zA-Z]*[rR][a-zA-Z]*\b|--recursive\b)\s+(?:.*?\s)?(?:-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*\b|--force\b)|(?:-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*\b|--force\b)\s+(?:.*?\s)?(?:-[a-zA-Z]*[rR][a-zA-Z]*\b|--recursive\b))\s+(?:/|~/?)\*?(?:\s|$)
+            |
+            (?:/|~/?)\*?(?:\s+.*?)?\s+(?:-[a-zA-Z]*(?:r[a-zA-Z]*f|f[a-zA-Z]*r)[a-zA-Z]*\b|(?:-[a-zA-Z]*[rR][a-zA-Z]*\b|--recursive\b)\s+(?:.*?\s)?(?:-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*\b|--force\b)|(?:-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*\b|--force\b)\s+(?:.*?\s)?(?:-[a-zA-Z]*[rR][a-zA-Z]*\b|--recursive\b))(?:\s|$)
+        )
+    ").expect("rm -rf root regex")
+});
+static RM_RF_GENERIC: LazyLock<Regex> = LazyLock::new(|| {
+    Regex::new(r"(?ix)
+        \brm\s+
+        (?:.*?\s)?
+        (?:
+            -[a-zA-Z]*(?:r[a-zA-Z]*f|f[a-zA-Z]*r)[a-zA-Z]*\b
+            |
+            (?:-[a-zA-Z]*[rR][a-zA-Z]*\b|--recursive\b)\s+(?:.*?\s)?(?:-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*\b|--force\b)
+            |
+            (?:-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*\b|--force\b)\s+(?:.*?\s)?(?:-[a-zA-Z]*[rR][a-zA-Z]*\b|--recursive\b)
+        )
+    ").expect("rm -rf regex")
 });
-static RM_RF_GENERIC: LazyLock<Regex> =
